---
title: "Lecture NN"
subtitle: "Lecture Subtitle"
format: revealjs
---

## Main Message {.main-message}

*Write the central takeaway of the lecture in one or two short sentences.*

*If needed, add a second sentence that clarifies why the topic matters for analysis or practice.*

# Section Title

## Concept Slide

Introduce the idea before showing any code.

- Main point
- Supporting point
- Example or implication

## Code Example

Explain what the code is meant to do and why the example matters.

```{r}
# Example code used in class
```

State the result or interpretation after the code if students should notice something specific.

## Intervention Space {.intervention-slide}

Question to ponder.

::: fragment
- Write one short conceptual question.
:::

::: fragment
- *Answer:* Add a short answer that can be revealed later.
:::

## Two Columns

::::: columns
::: {.column width="40%"}
Left column for concepts, steps, or interpretation.
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
Right column for code, figures, or worked examples.
:::
:::::
